title: FormatInt16 — packs into 2 bytes
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatInt16 (number branded {integer:true; min:-32768; max:32767}); the [-32768,32767] bounds select a 2-byte signed binary encoding while JSON writes the plain number.
notes: Format-aware binary width: the int16 bounds fix each value at 2 bytes (getBinaryByteSizes [2,2,2]); JSON is lossless plain-number text.
